name: upwork-job-scraper-and-job-monitor
description: Commercial Apify Actor for scraping and monitoring public Upwork job listings by keyword, budget, job type, experience level, and posted time.

scripts.lint: node scripts/validate-json.js && node --check src/main.js && node --check src/upwork.js && node --check src/upwork-api.js && node --check src/scoring.js && node --check src/text.js
